parameters.query:
SELECT 
  document_id,
  status,
  storage_path_pdf,
  storage_path_docx,
  preview_data,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM generated_documents
WHERE contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}'
  AND document_type = 'executive-summary'
  AND source_type = 'quick_contract'
  AND status = 'generated'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  uc.contract_id,
  uc.contract_name,
  uc.file_name,
  uc.detected_contract_type,
  uc.contract_type_key,
  uc.status as contract_status,
  uc.clause_count,
  uc.created_at as contract_created,
  uc.uploaded_by_user_id,
  uc.company_id,
  
  -- Initiator (uploader)
  u.first_name as initiator_first_name,
  u.last_name as initiator_last_name,
  u.email as initiator_email,
  
  -- Initiator company
  c.company_name as initiator_company,
  c.company_type as initiator_company_type,
  c.industry as initiator_industry
 
FROM uploaded_contracts uc
LEFT JOIN users u ON uc.uploaded_by_user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON uc.company_id = c.company_id
WHERE uc.contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}';

SELECT 
  qr.recipient_id,
  qr.recipient_name,
  qr.recipient_email,
  qr.recipient_company,
  qr.status as recipient_status,
  qr.first_viewed_at,
  qr.responded_at,
  qr.response_type,
  qc.quick_contract_id,
  qc.status as qc_status
 
FROM quick_contracts qc
JOIN qc_recipients qr ON qr.quick_contract_id = qc.quick_contract_id
WHERE qc.source_contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}'
ORDER BY qr.created_at ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_clauses,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE clarence_certified = true) as certified_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_header = true) as header_count,
  
  -- Position distribution across the 1-10 scale
  ROUND(AVG(clarence_position)::numeric, 2) as avg_position,
  ROUND(MIN(clarence_position)::numeric, 2) as min_position,
  ROUND(MAX(clarence_position)::numeric, 2) as max_position,
  
  -- Fairness distribution
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE clarence_fairness = 'balanced') as balanced_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE clarence_fairness = 'customer_favoring') as customer_favoring_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE clarence_fairness = 'provider_favoring') as provider_favoring_count,
  
  -- Category breakdown (top 5)
  (SELECT json_agg(cat_row) FROM (
    SELECT category, COUNT(*) as clause_count
    FROM uploaded_contract_clauses
    WHERE contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}'
      AND is_header IS NOT TRUE
    GROUP BY category
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 5
  ) cat_row) as top_categories
 
FROM uploaded_contract_clauses
WHERE contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}'
  AND is_header IS NOT TRUE;

SELECT 
  clause_id,
  clause_number,
  clause_name,
  category,
  clarence_position,
  clarence_fairness,
  clarence_summary,
  clarence_assessment,
  clarence_flags,
  clarence_certified,
  display_order
 
FROM uploaded_contract_clauses
WHERE contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}'
  AND is_header IS NOT TRUE
  AND clarence_certified = true
ORDER BY 
  CASE WHEN clarence_flags IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_array_length(clarence_flags) > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  ABS(clarence_position - 5) DESC,
  display_order ASC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_events,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'agreed' AND party_role = 'initiator') as initiator_agreed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'agreed' AND party_role = 'respondent') as respondent_agreed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'queried') as queries_raised,
  COUNT(DISTINCT clause_id) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'agreed') as clauses_with_agreement,
  
  -- Both parties agreed on same clause
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.clause_id)
   FROM qc_clause_events a
   JOIN qc_clause_events b ON a.clause_id = b.clause_id 
     AND a.contract_id = b.contract_id
   WHERE a.contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}'
     AND a.event_type = 'agreed' AND a.party_role = 'initiator'
     AND b.event_type = 'agreed' AND b.party_role = 'respondent'
  ) as fully_agreed_clauses
 
FROM qc_clause_events
WHERE contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}';

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_messages,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sender_role = 'initiator') as initiator_messages,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sender_role = 'respondent') as respondent_messages,
  MIN(created_at) as first_message_at,
  MAX(created_at) as last_message_at
 
FROM qc_party_messages
WHERE contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}';

DELETE FROM generated_documents 
WHERE contract_id = '{{ $('Validate Request').first().json.contract_id }}'
  AND document_type = 'executive-summary'
  AND source_type = 'quick_contract';
 
INSERT INTO generated_documents (
  contract_id,
  document_type,
  source_type,
  document_name,
  storage_path_pdf,
  preview_data,
  generation_params,
  ai_model_used,
  status,
  created_at,
  updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Validate Request').first().json.contract_id }}',
  'executive-summary',
  'quick_contract',
  '{{ $json.preview_data.title }}',
  '{{ $json.storage_path_pdf }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.preview_data) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ bucket: $json.pdf_bucket, filename: $json.pdf_filename, public_url: $json.pdf_public_url }) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.ai_model_used || "claude-sonnet-4-20250514" }}',
  'generated',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING document_id, created_at;

INSERT INTO system_events (
  contract_id,
  user_id,
  journey_type,
  step_name,
  status,
  source_system,
  source_identifier,
  context,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Validate Request').first().json.contract_id }}',
  '{{ $('Validate Request').first().json.user_id }}',
  'document_generation',
  'qc_executive_summary_generated',
  'completed',
  'n8n',
  '6.1Q QC Executive Summary',
  '{"document_type": "executive-summary", "source_type": "quick_contract"}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
);
